message:
feat(fuzz): auto-isolate CARGO_TARGET_DIR and TMPDIR for multi-agent fuzz sessions

When multiple agents run fuzz validation concurrently, they contend on
the shared Cargo target directory lock, causing spurious build failures.
This commit makes validate_fuzz_p2.sh self-isolating:

scripts/validate_fuzz_p2.sh:
- When CARGO_TARGET_DIR is not already set, auto-assigns an isolated
  per-run directory using the pattern: {root}/fuzz_validate_{timestamp}_{pid}/target
- Prefers /dev/shm for the target root (RAM-backed tmpfs) for faster
  builds; falls back to .tmp/{user} within the project root
- When TMPDIR is not set, co-locates it alongside the target directory
- Creates both directories before the build step
- Prints the resolved paths for diagnostic visibility

fuzz/README.md:
- Documents the new auto-isolation behavior so agents and developers
  understand why CARGO_TARGET_DIR may point to /dev/shm

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,6 +93,10 @@ is available. Override behavior explicitly when needed:
 ./scripts/validate_fuzz_p2.sh --no-rch
 ```
 
+When `CARGO_TARGET_DIR`/`TMPDIR` are not already set, the script auto-assigns
+an isolated per-run target/temp directory (preferring `/dev/shm`) to reduce
+Cargo lock contention in multi-agent sessions.
+
 Report files are written to `fuzz/reports/p2_validation_*.json` and include:
 - build status/exit code/time and build log path
 - per-target status (`pass`/`fail`/`crashed`), exit code, duration, corpus growth, artifact growth

@@ -151,6 +151,25 @@ echo ""
 
 cd "$FUZZ_DIR"
 
+if [ -z "${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-}" ]; then
+    if [ -d /dev/shm ] && [ -w /dev/shm ]; then
+        TARGET_ROOT="/dev/shm/pi_agent_rust/${USER:-agent}"
+    else
+        TARGET_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/.tmp/${USER:-agent}"
+    fi
+    export CARGO_TARGET_DIR="$TARGET_ROOT/fuzz_validate_${STAMP}_$$/target"
+fi
+
+if [ -z "${TMPDIR:-}" ]; then
+    export TMPDIR="$(dirname "$CARGO_TARGET_DIR")/tmp"
+fi
+
+mkdir -p "$CARGO_TARGET_DIR" "$TMPDIR"
+
+echo "CARGO_TARGET_DIR: $CARGO_TARGET_DIR"
+echo "TMPDIR: $TMPDIR"
+echo ""
+
 # -------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Step 1: Build all fuzz targets
 # -------------------------------------------------------------------
